name: Lemon Walnut Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
3/4 Stick (6 Tbsp) cold unsalted butter, cut into bits
1/3 cup Miller's bran (try a natural food store)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the unbleached flour, brown sugar, baking powder, soda & salt. Blend in the butter until mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Stir in the whole-wheat flour, bran, walnuts and raisins until the mixture is combined.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the rind, egg and buttermilk. Add this mixture to the flour mixture and stir the mixture with a fork until it just forms a sticky but manageable dough.
4. Knead the dough lightly on a floured surface for 30 seconds.
5. Pat the dough into a 3/4 inch thick round.
6. Cut out rounds with a 2 or 2-1/4 inch cutter dipped in flour and arrange them on a buttered baking sheet.
7. Form the scraps into a ball, pat into 3/4 inch thick round and repeat.
8. Arrange the rounds on the baking sheet.
9. Brush the tops with egg wash.
10. Bake the scones in the middle of a pre-heated 400 degree oven for 15 - 17 minutes or until golden.
11. Serve the scones warm with butter and jams.
